中文

ESP32 Open Source Drone
STEM Education Platform

An open-source drone solution based on Espressif ESP32-S2/S3. Supports Wi-Fi phone control with a complete STEM curriculum from assembly to AI.

Start Learning Explore Hardware Downloads
📚

3-Level Curriculum

Beginner (Ready to Fly), Intermediate (Code & Tune), Advanced (AI & Algorithms)

💻

ESP-IDF + Arduino

Based on Crazyflie open-source firmware, ESP-IDF v5.0 framework

📶

Wi-Fi Control

Built-in Wi-Fi hotspot, control via iOS/Android app

🔧

Open Hardware

Complete schematics, PCB design, and 3D printable frame files

Graduated Learning Path

From "Learning by Playing" to "Creating by Learning", progressively unlock drone skills

Beginner: Flight Explorer

Ready to fly, experience the joy

Level Beginner
Coding No coding
Duration 1-2 weeks
Projects 6 fun projects
View Tutorials

Intermediate: Flight Engineer

Modify code, understand flight control

Level Intermediate
Coding Basic C
Duration 1-2 months
Projects 6 advanced projects
View Tutorials

Advanced: Flight Scientist

Algorithm design, system integration

Level Advanced
Coding C + Python
Duration 2-3 months
Projects 7 challenge projects
View Tutorials
